data.name: Crypts & Curves
data.detailed_description:
Step into the boots of an aspiring adventurer with the noble goal of conquering the infamous Crypt of Curves. Delve into the  labyrinthian passage ways, encounter ravenous monster girls, and reap worthy rewards!

Barter, fight, or charm your way through encounters with the horny dungeon denizens. While swinging a sword may solve most problems talking works too. Each of the 10 unique monster girls have their own erotic encounter and personality.

Traverse the Crypt of Curves in search of treasure, relics, and powerful gear, and unlock a spicy gallery once your adventure concludes.

Features:

  • 3D overworld exploration.

  • 2D turn-based combat.

  • Multiple ways to interact in combat: talking, fighting, and using items.

  • 10 Unique monster girls featuring a wide arrange of body-types and personalities.

  • NSFW art and animations.

  • Rogue-like elements such as Relics, gear, and randomization.

  • A scene viewer to revisit saucy animations after the fact.

Accessibility Features:

  • Dyslexia-friendly fonts to enhance readability.

  • Easy Mode for those who prefer a more relaxed experience.

  • Switch between scenes featuring a male or female in the settings

  • Good Boy mode, ideal for streamers or people who do not want to see NSFW content.

  • Motion sickness features to accommodate players.

  • NSFW Filters to enable to disable disliked content.

  • One-handed mode for added convenience and comfort.

data.short_description: Explore, Fight, and Fuck your way to victory. Delve into the Crypt of Curves in search of riches, stay for the monstrous maidens.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, or later
  • 處理器: 2 GHz+
  • 記憶體: 32 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Windows XP, Vista, 7, or later
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 9 (or later) compatible sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, or later
  • 處理器: 2 GHz+
  • 記憶體: 32 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Windows XP, Vista, 7, or later
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 9 (or later) compatible sound card
